title: atomic union
description: Untagged union of scalar atoms (Date | number | string | null | bigint). Members resolve by runtime kind — no discriminator. Date encodes to an ISO string and bigint to a decimal string on the wire; number, string and null pass through unchanged.
notes: Date and bigint members carry per-kind wire transforms (Date↔ISO string, bigint↔decimal string); the decoder restores each from its scalar form.
